format.dpo: TRL explicit-prompt preference format with prompt/chosen/rejected.
format.reward_model: Pairwise full-trajectory preference rows with chosen/rejected text.
format.sft: TRL conversational SFT format with a messages column.

source_note: SFT rows use accepted clean trajectories. DPO/reward-model rows use full trajectory preferences. Current pairs may be cross-instance; collect same-instance multi-rollout pairs for stronger task-specific DPO.
